thread.h(3) Library Functions Manual thread.h(3)

NAME

thread.h - WASM stub for thread.h - avoids including pthread.h which has Emscripten-incompatible attributes.

SYNOPSIS

Macros


#define asciichat_thread_create(thread_ptr, attr, start_routine, arg)
#define asciichat_thread_join(thread, timeout_ms)
#define asciichat_thread_detach(thread)
#define asciichat_thread_self()
#define asciichat_thread_equal(t1, t2)
#define asciichat_thread_exit(status)
#define asciichat_thread_initialized(thread)
#define thread_id_self()
#define thread_id_equal(id1, id2)
#define tls_key_create(key_ptr)
#define tls_key_delete(key)
#define tls_getspecific(key)
#define tls_setspecific(key, value)

Typedefs


typedef void * asciichat_thread_t
typedef void * thread_id_t
typedef void * tls_key_t

Detailed Description

WASM stub for thread.h - avoids including pthread.h which has Emscripten-incompatible attributes.

In WASM, we don't support actual threads. This provides type definitions that allow the code to compile without including the system pthread.h, which has attributes like 'regparm' that Emscripten doesn't support.

Definition in file lib/platform/wasm/stubs/thread.h.
